name: get_theme_variables
description:
Get theme variables and design tokens.

Accepts a theme name:
- **"default"** — Returns the base/default theme: Pro base design tokens + OSS default theme variables
- **Pro themes** (e.g. "brutalism", "glass", "mouve") — Returns full Pro theme variant CSS (variables, fonts, component overrides)

No params returns all available theme names.

Examples:
- get_theme_variables() → lists available themes
- get_theme_variables({ theme: "default" }) → base Pro tokens + OSS default tokens
- get_theme_variables({ theme: "brutalism" }) → full brutalism theme variant CSS

theme.description: Theme name: "default" for base tokens, or a Pro theme variant name.
